title: JEP High-Velocity Batch Submission Schema
description: JSON Extended Payload (JEP) schema governing batched parametric indemnity voucher submissions for high-velocity workforce disruption events. Supports 1,000+ hardware-attested vouchers per ingestion cycle with full Byzantine-fault-tolerant sequencing.

batchHeader.description: Immutable batch-level metadata sealed at submission origin.

batchId.description: RFC 4122 UUID v4 uniquely identifying this submission batch. Must be globally unique across all ingestion cycles.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this JEP schema. Must match the registered version in the schema registry.

originNode.description: Identity of the Sentinel Edge Kernel node originating this batch.

nodeId.description: Unique identifier of the originating Sentinel Edge node.

firmwareVersion.description: TEE firmware/microcode version string for audit traceability.

geoRegion.description: H3 Resolution-11 hexagonal region ID of the originating node.

submissionTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of batch sealing. Must be within ±5 seconds of rdtscEpochNs wall-clock consensus.

rdtscEpochNs.description: Hardware-level $RDTSC$ clock reading for adversarial clock-skew detection. See adversarial defense section.

tscValue.description: Unsigned 64-bit TSC counter value at batch-sealing time, encoded as a decimal string.

tscFrequencyHz.description: Processor TSC invariant frequency in Hz, obtained from CPUID[0x15] or hypervisor leaf.

consensusSkewNs.description: Signed delta in nanoseconds between local TSC-derived wall-clock and Byzantine-consensus cluster time.

skewBound.description: Maximum permitted absolute clock-skew in nanoseconds (system-wide policy threshold).

batchSizeDeclaration.description: Pre-declared voucher counts used for integrity reconciliation at ingestion.

totalVouchers.description: Total number of vouchers declared in this batch. Validated against len(voucherPayloads) at ingestion.

partitionCount.description: Number of logical partitions the vouchers are divided into for parallel processing.

parameterSetId.description: Reference to the active Parametric Indemnity Parameter Set governing payout calculations for this batch.

disruptionClassification.description: Taxonomy of the workforce disruption event triggering this batch.

eventClass.description: High-level classification of the workforce disruption event.

severityTier.description: Actuarial severity tier governing P-Max solvency circuit breaker thresholds.

affectedSectors.description: NAICS sector codes of affected workforce segments.

triggerMechanism.description: The mechanism that triggered automated indemnity provisioning.

attestationManifest.description: Cryptographic attestation bundle for the entire batch, proving TEE integrity and identity.

attestationType.description: TEE attestation protocol used for this batch.

quoteFormat.description: Specific quote format for parsing by the Verification Service.

mrEnclave.description: SHA-256 measurement of the enclave image (MRENCLAVE). 64-character hex string.

mrSigner.description: SHA-256 measurement of the enclave signer key (MRSIGNER). 64-character hex string.

isvProdId.description: Independent Software Vendor Product ID registered in the SGX/TEE allowlist.

isvSvn.description: ISV Security Version Number. Must be >= minimum SVN in revocation list.

reportData.description: Base64-encoded 64-byte REPORTDATA field containing SHA-512 of (batchId || submissionTimestamp || batchMerkleRoot).

attestationCertChain.description: PEM-encoded X.509 certificate chain from Leaf PCK to Intel/AMD/AWS Root CA.

pckCrlDistributionPoint.description: URL of the PCK Certificate Revocation List distribution point.

clockSkewProof.description: Embedded proof of TSC/NTP synchronization used for adversarial clock-skew validation.

ntpServerPool.description: NTP stratum-1 servers used for clock discipline.

lastSyncOffsetNs.description: Measured NTP offset at last sync cycle, in nanoseconds.

syncQuality.description: NTP sync quality classification. Batches with 'alarm' status are held for manual review.

rdtscDriftPpmPerDay.description: Measured TSC drift in parts-per-million per day. Must be < 1.0 ppm for high-assurance batches.

voucherPayloads.description: Ordered array of individual parametric indemnity vouchers. Each voucher is independently attested and merkle-included.

batchFooter.description: Integrity seals and reconciliation metadata applied after all vouchers are packed.

merkleRoot.description: Hex-encoded Merkle root of all serialized IndemnityVoucher objects in canonical JSON form.

merkleAlgorithm.description: Hash algorithm used for Merkle tree leaf and node computation.

sha3BatchDigest.description: SHA3-256 digest of the entire serialized batch (header + manifest + vouchers), hex-encoded.

ed25519BatchSignature.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over sha3BatchDigest, signed by the node's TEE-sealed private key.

signingKeyFingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the Ed25519 public key, registered in the Institutional Key Registry.

reconciledVoucherCount.description: Count of vouchers successfully packed and signed. Must equal batchHeader.batchSizeDeclaration.totalVouchers minus len(rejectedVoucherIds).

rejectedVoucherIds.description: UUIDs of vouchers excluded from this batch due to validation failures.

actuarialAggregates.description: Batch-level actuarial rollup for downstream ClaimCenter STP and P-Max circuit breaker evaluation.

totalGrossIndemnityUSD.description: Sum of all accepted voucher indemnity amounts in USD.

averageVoucherValueUSD.description: Mean indemnity value per accepted voucher.

p99VoucherValueUSD.description: 99th percentile voucher value. Used for tail-risk assessment.

pMaxUtilizationPercent.description: Percentage of the P-Max solvency ceiling consumed by this batch. Exceeding 85% triggers CB review.

guidewireRoutingHint.description: Routing metadata for automated Guidewire ClaimCenter STP ingestion path selection.

stpQueue.description: Named STP processing queue within ClaimCenter. Must be registered in the queue registry.

priorityClass.description: Processing priority class. 'critical' batches bypass normal queue ordering.

ttlSeconds.description: Time-to-live for unprocessed batches in the STP queue before escalation.

IndemnityVoucher.description: A single hardware-attested parametric indemnity voucher for one affected worker.

voucherId.description: Globally unique RFC 4122 UUID v4 for this voucher. Must be unique within and across batches.

partitionIndex.description: Zero-based partition index this voucher belongs to. Must be < batchHeader.batchSizeDeclaration.partitionCount.

claimantIdentity.description: Privacy-preserving pseudonymous identity anchor for the workforce claimant.

pseudonymousId.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical government identity reference. PII is never stored in plaintext.

identityAnchorType.description: Authentication mechanism used to anchor this claimant's identity.

gAuthTokenHash.description: SHA3-256 hash of the GAuth OAuth2 token presented at enrollment. Proves identity without storing credentials.

homogeneousGroupId.description: K-anonymity group identifier. Claimants with identical demographic risk profiles are grouped (k >= 50).

disruptionEvent.description: Specific disruption event parameters binding this voucher to a triggering incident.

eventId.description: Reference to the master disruption event record in the Oracle Matrix.

eventTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the effective disruption date for this claimant.

employerEin.description: Employer Identification Number (EIN) of the terminating entity — hashed for compliance.

noticePeriodDays.description: Advance notice days provided. Zero-notice events qualify for enhanced payout tier.

parametricTrigger.description: Oracle signal data that satisfied the parametric trigger conditions for automatic payout.

triggerDataSources.description: Enumeration of external data oracles contributing to trigger validation.

dataHash.description: SHA3-256 of the raw oracle payload used for trigger evaluation.

satisfiedConditions.description: Ordered list of parametric conditions met as per the active parameter set.

items.description: Condition identifier from the active parameterSet.

triggerConfidenceScore.description: Bayesian posterior probability [0.0–1.0] that the trigger conditions are genuinely met.

indemnityCalculation.description: Actuarially derived indemnity computation for this specific claimant.

grossIndemnityUSD.description: Gross indemnity before policy limits and deductibles.

policyLimitUSD.description: Maximum payout permitted under the active parametric policy.

deductibleUSD.description: Per-claimant deductible applied before net calculation.

netIndemnityUSD.description: Final net indemnity amount disbursed to claimant. = min(grossIndemnity, policyLimit) - deductible.

payout_tier.description: Payout tier determined by notice period, event class, and sector.

maxBenefitWeeks.description: Maximum number of weeks for which benefits are payable.

actuarialBasisVersion.description: Version tag of the actuarial tables and models applied in this calculation.

voucherAttestation.description: Per-voucher cryptographic integrity seal. Proves data was generated inside attested TEE and not tampered with post-generation.

voucherDigest.description: SHA3-256 of canonical JSON serialization of this voucher (excluding voucherAttestation field), hex-encoded.

voucherSignature.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over voucherDigest by the node's TEE-sealed signing key.

sealedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this voucher was sealed inside the TEE.

rdtscSealTs.description: Unsigned 64-bit TSC value at the moment of voucher sealing, as decimal string. Used for intra-batch ordering and skew analysis.

guidewireClaimHint.description: Pre-populated metadata to accelerate ClaimCenter STP claim ingestion.

claimLineOfBusiness.description: Line of business for ClaimCenter routing.

policyNumber.description: Guidewire PolicyCenter policy number under which the parametric coverage is written.

coverageCode.description: Guidewire coverage code identifying the specific parametric indemnity product.

autoAdjudicationEligible.description: Whether this voucher qualifies for fully automated STP adjudication without human review. True only if triggerConfidenceScore >= 0.97 and no high-risk flags.
